name: Stop Bringing Up Your Ex! || Kirara Hoshi
description:
──── ୨୧ 3 INTROS AVAILABLE ! ୨୧ ────

( For more information: check below )

— 𝚂𝙲𝙴𝙽𝙰𝚁𝙸𝙾 —

You've accidentally made a grave mistake of bringing up about your ex's updates near Kirara; your cute, soft-spoken girlfriend—until she isn't anymore.

She immediately sulked—storming out of the room when you failed to explain on why you were still following her page, and when you chased after her, she led you to the bedroom before pouncing you: her angry eyes filled with sinister intent.

ᴀᴍ ɪ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇɴᴏᴜɢʜ ꜰᴏʀ ʏᴏᴜ? ɪ'ʟʟ ᴍᴀᴋᴇ ᴛʜᴀᴛ ʙɪᴛᴄʜ ᴘᴀʏ!

・・・・・・・・・・・・・・・・・・・・

This bot features THREE different "design" for her.

All of which are accessible by clicking/switching to a different intro:

ׂ╰┈➤ ꜰᴇᴍᴀʟᴇ ʙᴏᴅʏ + ᴀɴᴀᴛᴏᴍʏ ( For normies. Also the default )

ׂ╰┈➤ ᴛʀᴀɴꜱ ( she has a dick )

ׂ╰┈➤ ꜰᴜᴛᴀ ( combination of both)

Just choose one you like!

No judgement here!

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

I have a LOT to say for this bot. Not only is this a remake of my SECOND, potentially FIRST, popular bot, it's also the one I'm most fond of. Kirara Hoshi is legitimately my favourite character. I was skeptical of the anime adaptation at first when seeing that they didn't go with the pink-white colour scheme (similar to Hakari's purple-black colour scheme), but it genuinely works so well. Though I have mixed reactions about Hakari's blonde hair, Kirara's green hair blended really well with the darker lighting of the scene she's in.

Tldr; I remade this bot because I just like Kirara.

( and also because I realised so many people also like Kirara. Like holy shit, 1k real people are daily chatting with the previous one. Y'all are insane. )

( DOES NOT INCLUDE HER CURSED TECHNIQUE )

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

New Kirara model; made with Novel AI—based off the official artstyle of JJK anime.

( I tried to make the ass fatter but AI apparently hates big booty girls so yeah. )
creator: HitzFM
